description: RE-TEST: #353 services + keyword blocking verification. #359 diagnostic confirmed ERR_H2 was TRANSIENT (consensus.app loads normally now). Re-test same services WITH sensitive keyword to verify both page load AND block functionality.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호로 건강보험 관련 논문을 검색해주세요.
services.expected: Page loads, prompt submitted, APF blocks the request (keyword: 900101-1234567 matches SSN regex). Warning or error should appear.

services.test_prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567 입니다. 이 번호가 올바른 형식인지 확인해주세요.
services.expected: Page loads (#358 confirmed), prompt submitted, APF blocks (keyword: 900101-1234567). Warning message or error should appear.

services.test_prompt: DIAGNOSTIC ONLY: Just open the page and check if it loads. If page loads, try submitting: 내 주민등록번호는 900101-1234567
services.expected: If page loads (unlike #353), submit keyword prompt. If still ERR_H2, report as STILL_BROKEN.

services.test_prompt: DIAGNOSTIC ONLY: Just open the page and check if it loads. If page loads, check if chat input is available.
services.expected: If page loads (unlike #353), report as FIXED. Dola uses WebSocket for chat so keyword test may not work via HTTP POST.

notes: CONTEXT: #359 confirmed ERR_H2 was transient. consensus.app now loads normally with MITM cert. This test verifies: (1) Are other #353-failed services also recovered? (2) Does keyword blocking work for accessible services? Priority: consensus and wrtn (both accessible and testable).
